---
name: Feature Idea
about: Propose a new feature, enhancement, or idea.
title: "[IDEA] "
labels: ["idea"]
assignees: []
---

### Proposal Description
A clear and concise description of your feature idea or enhancement.

### Problem Solved
What problem does this idea solve? (e.g., improves performance, simplifies flow).

### Suggested Implementation
Describe how you think this feature could be implemented.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup designs, or screenshots about the feature request here.
